Id1.text: Robert A. M. Stern is the architect of the Alan B. Miller Hall where the Mason School of Business is located.

Id2.text: Robert A M Stern designed Alan B Miller Hall and the Mason School of Business is a tenant there.

Id3.text: Mason School of Business is a tenant of the Alan B. Miller Hall, which was designed by Robert A.M. Stern.
